item.title: Paras Defence and Space Technologies Ltd Hits Intraday High with Strong 8.33% Surge
item.description: Paras Defence and Space Technologies Ltd recorded a robust intraday performance on 4 Mar 2026, surging to a day’s high of Rs 750, marking an 8.33% increase. The stock outperformed its sector and broader market indices amid heightened volatility and sustained buying momentum. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: Lodha Developers Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 4 Mar 2026
item.description: Lodha Developers Ltd witnessed a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 933.4, reflecting sustained price pressure amid broader market weakness. The stock underperformed its sector and the benchmark Sensex, continuing a six-day losing streak that has seen its value drop by over 13%. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: HDFC Asset Management Company Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: HDFC Asset Management Company Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 2,567.1, reflecting a 3.09% drop as the stock faced significant price pressure amid broader market weakness and sector underperformance. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: Tejas Networks Ltd Hits Intraday High with 7.45% Surge on 4 March 2026
item.description: Tejas Networks Ltd demonstrated robust intraday strength on 4 March 2026, surging to a day’s high of Rs 529.65, marking a 9.1% rise from its previous close. The stock outperformed its sector and broader market indices amid volatile trading conditions, registering a notable 7.63% gain by market close. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: Adani Green Energy Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 4 March 2026
item.description: Adani Green Energy Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 871.3 as the stock faced significant price pressure amid a broadly weak market environment. The share price fell by 3.54% from the previous close, underperforming its sector and the broader market indices. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: R M Drip & Sprinklers Systems Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: R M Drip & Sprinklers Systems Ltd witnessed a sharp decline today, hitting an intraday low of Rs. 57.19, marking a new 52-week and all-time low. The stock opened with a significant gap down and underperformed its sector and the broader market, reflecting sustained selling pressure and heightened volatility. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: Steel Authority Of India Ltd. Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Steel Authority Of India Ltd. (SAIL) experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 156.2 as the stock faced significant price pressure amid broader market weakness and sector underperformance. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: Hindustan Zinc Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 4 March 2026
item.description: Hindustan Zinc Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 595.55 as the stock faced significant price pressure amid broader market weakness and sectoral downturns. The stock underperformed both its sector and the benchmark Sensex, reflecting heightened volatility and cautious sentiment in the non-ferrous metals space. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: JSW Steel Ltd. Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 4 March 2026
item.description: JSW Steel Ltd. experienced a notable decline on 4 Mar 2026, touching an intraday low of Rs 1,216.75, down 4.06% from the previous close. The stock underperformed its sector and the broader market amid heightened volatility and prevailing downward pressures. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: Cholamandalam Investment & Finance Company Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Cholamandalam Investment & Finance Company Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 1,635, reflecting a 4.04% drop as the stock faced significant price pressure amid broader market weakness and heightened volatility. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: Bajaj Finance Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 4 Mar 2026
item.description: Bajaj Finance Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 946.45, reflecting a 3.22% drop as the stock faced significant price pressure amid a broadly weak market environment and heightened volatility. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: Adani Ports & Special Economic Zone Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Adani Ports & Special Economic Zone Ltd experienced a notable intraday decline on 4 March 2026, touching a low of Rs 1,410.2, reflecting a 4.08% drop from previous levels. The stock underperformed its sector and broader market indices amid heightened volatility and sustained selling pressure. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: Varun Beverages Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 4 March 2026
item.description: Varun Beverages Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 432, pressured by broader market weakness and sector underperformance. The stock’s downward trajectory continued amid heightened volatility and a gap-down opening, reflecting immediate selling pressure and cautious market sentiment. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: Indian Oil Corporation Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 4 Mar 2026
item.description: Indian Oil Corporation Ltd (IOC) witnessed a notable decline today, hitting an intraday low of Rs 172.5, reflecting a price drop of 3.66% amid broad market weakness and sector-specific pressures. The stock underperformed the oil sector and the broader Sensex index, continuing a short-term downward trend. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: Rain Industries Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 4 March 2026
item.description: Rain Industries Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline on 4 Mar 2026, touching a low of Rs 133.5 as the stock faced notable price pressure amid a broadly weak market environment. The petrochemicals company’s shares underperformed both its sector and the broader Sensex index, continuing a recent trend of losses. Time: 25 minutes ago
